summary: Comprehensive testing of Tournament Control Room feature completed. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend/UI: 100% success - all 5 tabs verified. The Control Room modal correctly replaces the old Modifica page and follows the same architecture as the League Control Room.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Torneo Redubull with 32 participants in 'groups' status
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tournament Control Room feature is fully functional. The modal opens from 'Control Room' button in Tornei list. All 5 tabs work correctly: Info & Regole (tournament details), Modifica (form with name/fee editable, structural fields disabled for started tournaments), Partecipanti (participant table with username, email, registration date), Struttura Torneo (4 group cards + rounds table with actions), Zona Pericolo (Reset Gironi + Elimina Torneo with DELETE confirmation). Backend APIs tested: GET /tournaments/{id}, GET /admin/tournament-rounds/{id}, PUT /admin/tournaments/{id}, GET /admin/tournaments/{id}/participants, POST /admin/tournaments/{id}/reset-groups, DELETE /admin/tournaments/{id}.

control_room_button.exists_in_tornei_list: PASS - 'Control Room' button present for each tournament
control_room_button.opens_modal: PASS - clicking button opens modal with tournament name and status badge

tabs.info_regole: PASS - shows ID, formato, max participants, groups count, advance count, etc.
tabs.modifica: PASS - form with name (editable), fee (editable), structural fields (disabled for started tournaments)
tabs.partecipanti: PASS - participant list with username, email, registration date, and count (32/32)
tabs.struttura_torneo: PASS - group cards (A, B, C, D) with members and rounds table with action buttons
tabs.zona_pericolo: PASS - Reset Gironi section and Elimina Torneo section with DELETE confirmation

backend_apis.GET_tournaments_id: PASS - returns tournament details with all Control Room required fields
backend_apis.GET_admin_tournament_rounds: PASS - returns list of rounds with match counts
backend_apis.PUT_admin_tournaments_id: PASS - updates name and entry_fee for started tournaments (400 for structural fields)
backend_apis.GET_admin_tournaments_participants: PASS - returns 32 participants with user_id, username, email, registered_at
backend_apis.POST_admin_tournaments_reset_groups: PASS - endpoint exists and returns 404 for non-existent tournament
backend_apis.DELETE_admin_tournaments: PASS - endpoint exists and returns 404 for non-existent tournament
backend_apis.POST_admin_tournaments_participants: PASS - correctly returns 400 for started tournament
backend_apis.DELETE_admin_tournaments_participants: PASS - correctly returns 400 for started tournament

verified_features.tab_switching: PASS - all 5 tabs switch correctly without JS errors
verified_features.structural_field_locking: PASS - for started tournaments (status='groups'), structural fields are visibly disabled with warning message
verified_features.status_badge: PASS - modal header shows tournament name + status badge (GIRONI)
